label: Complexity & computability

node.label: Complexity & computability
node.definition: Computability and time, space, sample, and communication complexity describe what can be solved and at what cost.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Complexity & computability is modeled as depending on Algorithms & data structures, Discrete mathematics & logic and feeding downstream nodes such as Distributed systems & networking, Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention, Empirical scaling laws.
examples: atlas downstream link to Distributed systems & networking
atlas downstream link to Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention
atlas downstream link to Empirical scaling laws
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Algorithms & data structures, Discrete mathematics & logic.

dependencies.rationale: Complexity & computability rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Algorithms & data structures.
